catalogs.name: styles
catalogs.description: Visual design styles with mood, color strategy, typography role, spacing, motion level and use cases

catalogs.name: palettes
catalogs.description: WCAG-compliant color palettes per product type with hex values for primary, secondary, accent, bg and fg

catalogs.name: typography
catalogs.description: Heading and body font pairings with Google Fonts URLs, Tailwind snippets, mood and product type

catalogs.name: charts
catalogs.description: Chart types across recharts, chart.js, d3, nivo and tremor with accessibility notes and use cases

catalogs.name: ui-reasoning
catalogs.description: Structured UI decision rationale for common design choices with explicit tradeoffs

catalogs.name: ux-guidelines
catalogs.description: Animation guidelines with duration, easing functions and reduced-motion fallbacks per interaction category

catalogs.name: landing-patterns
catalogs.description: Landing page section patterns with components, vibe fit and conversion role

catalogs.name: product-patterns
catalogs.description: In-product UI patterns for dashboards, settings, onboarding, data tables and more

catalogs.name: motion
catalogs.description: GPU-safe animation definitions using only transform and opacity with reduced-motion alternatives

catalogs.name: spacing-scales
catalogs.description: Spacing scales from micro (4px base) to editorial (32px base) with Tailwind class references

catalogs.name: density-rules
catalogs.description: UI density rules per context with minimum touch targets, line heights and padding base values
